How It Works

Three Steps to Your Future

📝
Step 01

Complete Your Application

Fill in your personal, academic and security details across our guided 4-step form with biometric verification.

🤖
Step 02

AI Screening Engine

Our risk engine evaluates 20+ data points instantly — auto-approving strong applications and flagging borderline cases.

🎓
Step 03

Get Your Decision

Receive an instant decision with your reference number. Track progress and request up to 5 corrections during review.

🏦 Refund Payment DetailsFor Refunds
💡
Provide your bank account or UPI details for fee refunds. This ensures refunds are processed directly to your account without delay.
Account holder name is required
Bank name is required
Account number is required
Account numbers do not match
Valid 11-character IFSC code required
Branch address is required
Valid UPI ID required (e.g. name@upi)
Your UPI ID will be used to credit refund amounts directly.
🚌 Transport PreferenceOptional
🚌
Would you like to avail the college transport service? If yes, a bus seat will be assigned after your application is approved. Seat allocation follows gender-based grouping — female students are always seated together.
Seat number will be assigned by admin after approval. Subject to availability on your gender-allocated block.
ℹ️ How Transport Works
• Upon approval, admin assigns your Bus No., Seat No. and Route
• Female seats are grouped: seat 1F assigned Female → next female gets 2F, etc.
• Seats are periodically reshuffled (scheduled by admin) while preserving gender grouping
• Students with Attendance >90% AND Academic % >90% may request a seat change from their dashboard
• If your route is full, a new bus is automatically added

📋 Application Details
✏️ Admin Rectification
✅

Application Submitted!

Your application has been received and automatically processed. Use the reference below to track your status.

🖨️
Print Your Application
Opens the print screen — print directly or choose "Save as PDF" from your browser's print dialog
🎉

Auto-Approved!

Congratulations! Your application has been automatically approved by our AI system. Your academic journey begins now.

An official offer letter will be sent to your registered email within 2 business days.

🖨️
Print Your Approval Confirmation
Opens the print screen for your approved-status confirmation
❌

Application Rejected

Your application did not meet our eligibility criteria.


🔍

Forwarded for Review

Our AI system detected complexity in your application. It has been forwarded to our admissions team for manual review. You will be contacted within 5–7 business days.

Track your application status anytime using your reference number. You may submit up to 5 rectification requests during this period.

🖨️
Print Application Copy
Opens the print screen to keep a copy of your submitted application
